common_pairs.explanation: Mesh insertion is add-on to hernia repair
Adhesiolysis typically integral to bowel resection
Adhesiolysis during exploratory lap typically bundled
Adhesiolysis for cholecystectomy exposure typically bundled
Adhesiolysis for splenectomy exposure typically bundled
Multiple sinus procedures same side typically bundled
Simple and complex I&D same site typically bundled
Progressive debridement depths same site bundled
Different reconstruction techniques bilateral may bundle
Cannot bill partial and total thyroidectomy same side
Multiple laparoscopic hernia repairs may bundle
Laparoscopic gynecologic procedures may bundle
Component separation never bundles - distinct reconstructive
Cannot bill both simple and complex cholecystectomy
Laparoscopic ventral hernia repairs may bundle
Breast reduction with tissue transfer - depends on indication
Multiple sinus procedures same side typically bundled
Stoma creation may be integral to bowel resection
Wound VAC separate from exploratory procedure
Gynecologic procedures may bundle if same session
